summary:
Microsoft Corporation's (NASDAQ: MSFT) gaming revenue grew 11% on a year-over-year basis in the fourth quarter.

What Happened: The Satya Nadella-led company’s gaming division raked in $357 million in revenue in the quarter ended June 30.

headline: Starbucks Says 25% Of All Milk-Based Beverage Sales Came From Dairy Alternatives
summary:
Coffee chain Starbucks Corp. (NASDAQ: SBUX) said that 25% of its milk-related beverage sales in the U.S. now come from alternative dairy offerings.

What Happened: Starbucks made the disclosure while announcing its third-quarter results on Tuesday.

headline: Cathie Wood Trims Netflix Stake Despite Being Bullish On Gaming Foray, Buys Roblox Instead
summary: Cathie Wood-led Ark Investment Management on Tuesday trimmed its stake in streaming video-on-demand company Netflix Inc. (NASDAQ: NFLX) despite earlier this month spelling out a bull case for its gaming foray and loaded up some shares in another gaming company — Roblox Corp.

headline: Apple, Alibaba, AMD, Microsoft, Tesla — Stocks On WallStreetBets' Radar Today
summary: Microsoft Corp. (NASDAQ: MSFT) has joined Alibaba Group Holding Limited (NYSE: BABA), Advanced Micro Devices Inc.

headline: Apple Expects An Even Bigger Impact on iPhone Production From Chip Shortage In Q4 Compared With Current Quarter
summary: Apple Inc (NASDAQ: AAPL) is tapering down future earnings expectations as it comes face-to-face with the ongoing global semiconductors shortage.

headline: Bitcoin, Ethereum Surge, Dogecoin Stable, Axie Infinity Top Gainer As Crypto Market Moves Past The Amazon Jolt
summary: Major cryptocurrencies surged on Wednesday night as the global cryptocurrency market cap rose 4.3% to $1.53 trillion.
